_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to analyse and reflect on how our values and beliefs influence the development of our identities.

_source.w: We are learning to analyse and reflect on how our values and beliefs influence the development of our identities.
y: Values and beliefs are core to who we are — understanding them helps us navigate identity with greater self-awareness.
Reflecting on these influences helps us make more conscious choices about the person we want to be.
This analysis builds the emotional intelligence needed for healthy relationships and personal growth.
eg: Identifying the values and beliefs that are most important to us and where they come from.
Analysing how cultural, family, or religious values have shaped our identity.
Reflecting on how our values influence our behaviour, choices, and relationships.
Discussing how values can change over time and what triggers those changes.
Examining how conflicting values can create internal tension and how to manage it.
Exploring how Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander values of connection to Country, community, and culture shape identity.
